character.name: 보병 (Infantry)
character.prompt: Cute chibi-style ancient Chinese infantry soldier. Wearing brown and grey armor with a simple helmet. Holding a short sword in one hand and a round wooden shield in the other. Common foot soldier, sturdy and reliable. Adorable chibi proportions.
